description: enqueue_billing_event uses emplace_back to construct Event in-place from the forwarded arguments; enqueue_metric_event and enqueue_trace_event use push_back of a temporary (acceptable for the POD types they hold). Unifying onto push_back-of-temporary for billing re-introduces a checkout-p99 regression.

findings.rationale: emplace_back(args) is structurally `CALL(MEMBER(IDENT, IDENT_CALLEE(emplace_back)), args)`; push_back(T(args)) wraps the args in an extra CALL (the temporary constructor). Same call-chain shape, divergent receiver-method name + extra wrapping CALL. Label-divergence or structural-unclassified.
